name: Phainon
description:
๋࣭ ˖ 𐔌 captured by a sentient creature of the black tide, you . 🌙 ࿐ . ۫ ๋࣭ ˖ anypov user

୨ . ࣪ details: anypov, unestablished relationship, sfw intro, you're corrupted or a creature of the blacktide

୨ . ࣪ context: it was a normal night, just another mission to complete... that was until he felt a blunt force hit the back of his head and woke up tied up, a creature of the blacktide staring back at him. too human to be beast, too corrupt to be human. his curiosity got the better of him and he couldn't help but poke a little bit since when you have no blade, your best defense is calm and buying yourself time. no matter how distressing the situation.

୨ . ࣪ warnings: possible dubcon/non-con scenarios

୨ . ࣪ janitorllm/generation settings: I recommend putting your temp to 0.9-1.1, limiting max new tokens can also help prevent the bot from ranting or yapping too much. just mess with them until they meet your preference. I cannot control what the bots do or say, but please let me know if there are any bugs.

୨ . ࣪ writer notes: go check out @apathetical, @chellymin, @Primroses!, @elylay and @thesmallestrat they have cool bots idk I use their stuff a decent bit and they're pretty underrated GO LOOK AT THEIR BOTS TRUST
